product: Dynamic parameters in the new SQL editor
tagline: The new SQL editor now supports a Dynamic dropdown widget type for named parameter markers.
what_it_does: The new SQL editor now supports a Dynamic dropdown widget type for named parameter markers. Select a saved query to populate dropdown values, keeping the list current as your data changes. When you add a named parameter marker to a query, Databricks displays a parameter widget in the UI.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: The new SQL editor now supports a Dynamic dropdown widget type for named parameter markers.
